examples: I can't unscrew the lid of this jar.
You'll have to unscrew the handles to paint the door.
If you unscrew it, it actually looks like a Siamese twin bulb, with two bases and one head.
After several failed attempts to unscrew the bolt on the handrail, the spacewalkers ended up tearing it off with brute force.
Muddy water dripped from my hair into my eyebrows, lashes, and eyes, as I knelt to unscrew the lever that activated the rear brake.
